tasks.label: idf: build
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py build

tasks.label: idf: flash (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200 flash

tasks.label: idf: monitor (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200 monitor

tasks.label: idf: flash+monitor (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200 flash monitor

tasks.label: idf: app-flash fast (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 921600 app-flash

tasks.label: idf: app-flash+monitor fast (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 921600 app-flash && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200 monitor

tasks.label: idf: flash fast (/dev/ttyUSB0)
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 921600 flash

tasks.label: idf: menuconfig
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py menuconfig

tasks.label: idf: clean
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}" && export IDF_PATH="$HOME/esp/esp-idf" && source "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py clean
